emails.subject: Re: deal 574356
emails.body: Re: deal 574356 I've added the fee these are supposed to default when traders enter the deals in Enpower, but for some reason Bloomberg fees aren't coming through lately. I'm checking with IT on this. Thanks, Kate PS I'll add you to the Deal Correction Report mail list starting today. Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 04/09/2001 12:59 PM
